lessons.lesson: Specs de capa KDP Brazilian Classics: 1600×2560px, 300 DPI, JPEG 95%, RGB. Layout: collection label (Raleway, gold #D4AF37, topo) → título EN (Playfair Display, 72pt, branco, centro) → título PT (Playfair Italic, 36pt, cream #FFF8DC) → autor (Raleway, 32pt, branco, base). Borda decorativa gold com opacidade.
lessons.context: Script: projetos/brazilian-classics/scripts/generate_cover.py. Fontes necessárias: PlayfairDisplay-Variable.ttf, PlayfairDisplay-Italic.ttf, Raleway-Variable.ttf em fonts/. Workflow N8n: POST /webhook/cover-generator.
